title: Proclamation No. 505, s. 2003
text:
MALACAÑANG Manila

PROCLAMATION NO. 505

DECLARING MONDAY, DECEMBER 1, 2003, AS SPECIAL (NON-WORKING) DAY IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF CAINTA, RIZAL

WHEREAS , Monday, December 1, 2003, celebrates the Municipality’s “Araw ng Cainta”; and

WHEREAS , it is proper that the people of the Municipality of Cainta be given full opportunity to celebrate the occasion with appropriate ceremonies.

NOW, THEREFORE, I, ALBERTO G. ROMULO , Executive Secretary, by order of Her Excellency, GLORIA MACAPAGAL-ARROYO , do hereby declare Monday, December 1, 2003, as special (non-working) day in the Municipality of Cainta, Rizal.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF , I have hereunto set my hand and caused the seal of the Republic of the Philippines to be affixed.

Done in the City of Manila, this 28th day of November, in the year of Our Lord, Two Thousand and Three.

By order of the President: (Sgd.) ALBERTO G. ROMULO Executive Secretary

By the Executive Secretary: (Sgd.) JOAQUIN C. LAGONERA Senior Deputy Executive Secretary

Source : CDAsia
